results.title: Rex - The AI Agent for customer service
results.content:
Sign inStart for free

# Rex

Rex is built to work like the best customer service agent that works 24/7 to handle customer support, social interactions, and sales on WhatsApp & Instagram

Book a demoStart for free

## Rex handles your WhatsApp & Instagram with human quality service

### Knowledge

Rex uses all of your support knowledge to generate accurate answers.

### Behaviour

Rex speaks in your tone of voice, and follows your policies and procedures.

### Actions

Rex personalizes every interaction and takes actions on behalf of customers.

### Insights

AI-generated insights give you full visibility and trust in Rex’s performance.

## Knowledge

Leverages all your knowledge to create the perfect answer.

### Multi-source answers [...] ### Human handoff

Set up when and how Rex triages conversations or hands them off to your human support team. Rex will always automatically hand off when it's the safest option for the customer.

## Actions

Customize the experience for each customer.

### Data and actions

Rex can adapt to your tone of voice preferences, letting you personalize it or choose from options like professional, friendly, humorous, and more. You can also set the length of Rex’s responses, from short and concise to long and detailed.

/ COMING SOON

### Rex vision

Rex can read, analyze, and interpret images—such as screenshots, invoices, and error messages—allowing customers to share what they see without needing long explanations.

### Personalised answers [...] ### Knowledge sources

Rex quickly learns from a wide range of public and private knowledge sources, such as Help Center articles, internal support materials, PDFs, and URLs.

## Behaviour

Leverages all your knowledge to create the perfect answer.

### Tone of voice

Rex can adapt to your tone of voice preferences, letting you personalize it or choose from options like professional, friendly, humorous, and more. You can also set the length of Rex’s responses, from short and concise to long and detailed.

### Multilingual

Rex will automatically identify and resolve issues in over 10 languages, allowing you to choose which languages you want to support.

/ COMING SOON

### Real-time translation

results.title: Why AI Agents Work in Demos But Fail in Production
results.content:
What makes this frustrating is that the teams involved are rarely inexperienced. The engineers are competent. The models are capable. The architecture looks reasonable in design reviews. Yet something that appeared reliable in a controlled demo begins failing unpredictably under real production traffic.

Practitioner evidence points to the same underlying cause. The issue plaguing AI agent deployment is not prompt quality or model intelligence. It is a failure to account for basic probability in multi-step systems.

results.title: Meet the Rex AI Agent Powering Tomorrow’s Industries Today
results.content:
Built on principles of autonomy, reasoning, and goal-driven behavior, Autonomous Agentic AI™ enables intelligent agents to take initiative, collaborate, and evolve in real-time across digital and physical environments.

### Empower Your Enterprise with the Future of AI Agents

24/7 Intelligent Assistant — Always available to answer questions, handle tasks, and provide instant support.

Multi-Modal Interaction — Talk naturally (voice), chat in text, or use smart forms — whatever fits your users best.

Custom Workflows & Automations — Design tailored AI workflows for scheduling, lead generation, data capture, and follow-ups. [...] Industry Versatility — Perfect for real estate (virtual tours, inquiries agent assistant ), customer service (instant resolutions), education (AI tutoring), wellness (appointment booking), ticket booking and more.

E-Commerce Transactions Made Easy — Voice-assisted shopping, automated order forms, secure checkout, and real-time payment processing.

Scalable & Fast — Handles high volumes without sacrificing speed or accuracy, growing with your business.

Explore AI Agents now. For more information, contact armani@aiworld.tv or call 1-888-580-6610

Deep Dive: AI World Podcast [...] Built on principles of autonomy, reasoning, and goal-driven behavior, Autonomous Agentic AI™ enables intelligent agents to take initiative, collaborate, and evolve in real-time across digital and physical environments.

## We develop Autonomous Agentic AI

Autonomous Agentic AI™ is a next-generation artificial intelligence framework designed to think, act, and adapt independently. Unlike traditional AI systems that require constant human input, Autonomous Agentic AI™ operates with self-directed purpose—perceiving its environment, making complex decisions, and executing tasks with minimal intervention.
